title: Gov. Jared Polis signs new law rewriting Colorado AI regulations targeting discrimination
description: DENVER — Gov. Jared Polis signed legislation Thursday that rewrites and softens a Colorado law that sought to curb discrimination through the use of artificial intelligence, ending a two-year tug-of-war over how tightly the state should regulate the technology. Starting...
